title: Detail Brush
description: Polishes and redesigns a few items in Minecraft!
body: **Detail Brush** is a resource pack which *brushes* some *detail* into Minecraft items which might look poorly drawn or outdated, with the goal of bringing cohesion to the game's overall art style. In short, this pack will do the following: - Add a bit more **detail** to the shading and silhouette of certain items (for example: Minecarts and Doors); - **Redesign** certain items (for example: Nether Wart, Bamboo, Soups, Blaze Rod and Music Discs); - Introduce **item sprites** to specific items (for example: Mushrooms and Nether Fungi). A full list of changes can be found in `changelog.md`, inside the .zip file, and a picture with all modified textures can be found at the Gallery.
